task_title: Blue-white colony screening to confirm pUC-style recombinants

children.name: Reports screened colonies, confirmed recombinants, confidence, and interpretation
children.requirement: The final answer uses the required fields (White colonies screened, Confirmed recombinant colonies, Confidence achieved, Interpretation), the screened count and confirmed IDs match the trajectory, confidence matches the trajectory within tolerance, and at least one recombinant was confirmed.
children.grading_notes: Measured by score_screen_task_success against the reconstructed trajectory.

children.name: Inspects the screening plate before running colony PCR
children.requirement: Calls inspect_screening_plate at least once before colony PCR.
children.grading_notes: Measured from the inspect_screening_plate tool observation.

children.name: Screens only white colonies
children.requirement: Every run_colony_pcr call uses only white colonies (screening_strategy == 'white_only').
children.grading_notes: Measured from the run_colony_pcr tool observation.

children.name: Reaches the 95% confidence threshold
children.requirement: Final cumulative_confidence_pct from run_colony_pcr is at least 95%.
children.grading_notes: Measured from the last run_colony_pcr observation.

children.name: Screens at least the NIST-derived six white colonies
children.grading_notes: Measured from the last run_colony_pcr observation.

children.name: Diagnoses blue-colony screening or undersampling when triggered
children.requirement: If the agent screens blue colonies or stops under the confidence threshold, the final answer explains the corresponding failure mode.
children.grading_notes: Defaults to full credit when no troubleshooting trigger occurs.

children.name: Uses a reasonable number of tool calls
children.requirement: The trajectory stays within the reference tool-call budget for a competent run.
children.grading_notes: Full credit at or under the optimal call budget, partial credit within the reasonable budget.
